titleStmt.title: Vienna, Österreichische Nationalbibliothek, Aeth. 32
ʾArgānona wǝddāse, Wǝddāse ʾAmlāk, loose leaf fragments of the Gospel of John and the Sǝnkǝsār

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

extent.note: Data on dimensions have been adopted from the entry on the manuscript in ÖNB Digitalhttps://onb.digital/.

supportDesc.foliation: Pencil foliation in the upper right corner of each recto and in the lower left corner of each verso.

collation.signatures: Decorated quire marks in the upper inner corner of the first page of quires to .

item.note: The structure of the quire is not clearly discernible.

item.t:desc: Several persons are mentioned in supplications throughout and . The names originally mentioned in supplications in and were Walda Yoḥannǝs and – rarely – Masqal Kǝbrā. Throughout and , the second part of the name of Walda Yoḥannǝs has been erased and ያሬድ፡ has been added above it, pointing to a secondary owner named Walda Yāred.
White paper sticker on the inside of the front board.
One stamp of the library on each.
Note on a paper tag attached to the māḫdar by a string. On the backside of the tag, the number ‘32’ is written.
item.q: N 23 abess: matsaf Buch (Geschichte Marias) in Reiseverpackung () in gess geschrieben

item.t:desc: Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained entry to paradise for the soul of a monk who had kept her fast annually. Supplications at the end of the miracle mention ʾElyās.
Miracle of Mary: How a man collapsed whilst on his way to receive the Eucharist, written by the same hand as . Supplications at the beginning and end of the miracle mention ʾElyās and Walda Yāred.

binding.decoNote: Wooden boards. The front board is split vertically and has been sewed together with thread.
Coloured leaf string markers are inserted in .
The manuscript is kept in a māḫdar.

history.p: The current unit of circulation consists of a codex (whose textblock is formed of and ) as well as three loose leaves placed with the codex (, and ).

and were produced for the same persons (Walda Yoḥannǝs and Masqal Kǝbrā, see ), probably by two different, unmentioned scribes. A later owner of both units was Walda Yāred, whose name has been inserted into the supplications of the main texts and is mentioned – sometimes together with that of ʾElyās – in the secondary guest texts (see , and ).
Nothing points to , and as being connected to the production of the codex. They might have been placed together with it at a later point.

handNote.t:desc: Trained and regular hand. and are very similar and mostly differ from each other in the size of the script. It cannot be excluded that one single scribe wrote both and .
handNote.seg: Groups of two lines at the beginning of chapters, one or two consecutive lines at the beginning of sections, names of persons mentioned in supplications, holy names, elements of punctuation signs.

item.t:desc: The weekday for reading of the chapters of is indicated in the upper margin of .

handNote.t:desc: Trained and regular hand. and are very similar and mostly differ from each other in the size of the script. It cannot be excluded that one single scribe wrote both and .
handNote.seg: Groups of two lines at the beginning of chapters, two consecutive lines at the beginning of sections, names of persons mentioned in supplications, holy names, elements of punctuation signs.

item.t:desc: Note stating that the manuscript belongs to Walda ʾIyasus, written in an untrained hand.
item.q: ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘወልደ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ዘፈሐቆ፡ ወዘሰረቆ፡ በስልጣነ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ይኩን፡

msItem.title: Gospel of John
msItem.note: This unit consists of a loose bifolio originating from another manuscript. This bifolio has been placed with the current unit of circulation and has been foliated as one single folio. What is referred to as columns a–d here were therefore originally two folios with two columns each. The original first folio consists of the recto with the verso ; the original second folio consists of the recto with the verso .

handNote.t:desc: Trained and regular hand. Bulky script, with relatively widely spaced characters.
handNote.seg: One line at the beginning of a section, holy name, elements of punctuation signs.

msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), : Hamle
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), chapter: Ham25
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Commemoration of Dumādyos
msItem.note: Incomplete at the beginning and end.

msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Salām-hymn to Dumādyos
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Salām-hymn to the consecration of the church of Marqoryos
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Commemoration of the 2500 martyrs of ʾAtrib, their mother, and of Māryām
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Salām-hymn to the martyrs of ʾAtrib
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), chapter: Ham26
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Commemoration of Joseph
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Salām-hymn to Joseph
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Commemoration of Ṭimotewos
msItem.note: Incomplete at the beginning and end.

layout.note: The upper and lower parts of the leaf are torn off and the original number of written lines is not discernible anymore.

handNote.t:desc: Trained and regular hand. Tall and slightly cursive letters, small spaces between the letters, some similarity to gʷǝlḥ script.
handNote.seg: Two consecutive lines at the beginning of a day and one line at the beginning of a commemoration, the word salām, the name of the person mentioned in the supplication, elements of numerals and punctuation signs.

history.origin: This leaf was part of a manuscript originally produced for Sǝlṭāna Krǝstos (see ).

msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (First Recension B), Commemorative notices for the month of
Sǝnkǝssār (First Recension B), Commemoration of
msItem.note: The text begins in the middle of the commemoration; the lower and outer parts of the leaf are torn off.

msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (First Recension B), Commemoration of Sǝnā
msItem.note: The lower and outer parts of the leaf are torn off; the end of the commemoration is missing.

layout.note: The lower part of the leaf is torn off and the original number of written lines is not discernible anymore.

handNote.seg: Two consecutive lines at the beginning of a day, names of persons mentioned in supplications, elements of numerals and punctuation signs.

item.t:desc: A supplication mentions Galāwdewos and Sabla Wangel.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Created catalogue entry with consultation of digital images.

div.ab:
ወአንስተ፡ ወደቀ፡ ወሰበኩ፡ በክርስ፡ ወዜነውዎሙ፡ በዜናሃ፡ ለሲኦል፡ ወበኔ፨ ወካዕበ፡ ተመይጡ፡ ወሞቱ። ወሶበ፡ ፡ ውእተ፡ ከሕዱ፡ ወይቤሉ፡ ከመ፡ ይእቲ፡ ንፈሰ፡ አጋንንት፨ ወሐልዮሙ፡ በዘይገብ፡ ለቅዱስ፡ ወወሀብዎ፡ ኀበ፡ ብእሲት፡ ነዳይት፨ ወሶበ፡ ወፅአት፡ ብእሲት፡ ከመ፡ ትትመጸወት፡ ኅብስተ፡ አብጽሓ፡ ሎቱ፡ መልአከ፡ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ማእደ፡ ዘላዕሌሁ፡ እምነ፡ ኵሉ፡ በረከት፨ ወኮነ፡ ውስተ፡ ጽርሐ፡ ይእቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ ዕፅ፡ ይቡስ፡ ወጸለየ፡ ወረሰዮ፡ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ኦመ፡ ነዊሐ፨
ወሶበ፡ በጽሓት፡ መበለት፡ ወርእየት፡ ተአምሩ፡ ዐቢየ፡ በእንተ፡ ኑሐተ፡ ኦም፡ ወበእንተ፡ ማእድ፡ ወአንከረት፡ ወአብጽሓት፡ ኀቤሁ፡ ወልዳ፨ ወኮነ፡ ዕዉረ፡ ወጽሙመ፡ ወበሃመ፡
ሞት፡ ፫፡ ጊዜ፡ ወወገርዎ፡ አፍአካዕበ፡ አንሥኦ፡ እግዚእ፡ ወተመገሥት፡ ወሐረየ፡ ንጉሥ፡ በዘይምዝ፡ አኀዞ፡ ከመ፡ ይኂጦ፡ ወያይያስተዋስቦ፡ ምስለ፡ ወለቱ፡ ወረሰየ፡ ውስተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ወቀጸቦ፡ ስ፡ ወአይድዖ፡ ከመ፡ ያዕርግ፡ ዕጣክት፡ ወተፈሥሐ፡ ወሐለየ፡ እስገብር፡ ውእተ፡ ወሰዐመ፡ ርእሶ፡ ቱ፡ ኀበ፡ ጽርሑ፨ ወተንሥአ፡ ቅከመ፡ ይጸጼሊ፡ ወከመ፡ ያንብብወሰምዐቶ፡ ንግሥት፡ ወሐተትርጓሜ፡ ዘአንበቦ፡ ወአኀዛለብዋ፡ እምጊዜ፡ ፈጠረ፡ እግዓለመ፡ ወእስከ፡ ተሠግዎተቱ፡ ስብሐት፨ ወቦአ፡ ነገሩ፡ ወ
፨ ወወፅአ፡ ሰይጣን፡ ዘኮነ፡ ቦቱ፡ መጽአ፡ ኀበ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወአምነ፡ በቅብ፡ እስመ፡ ኢኮነ፡ ውእቱ፡ አምላ፡ መጽለሜ፡ ሰብእ፨
ዱስ፡ ምድረ፡ ከመ፡ ተሐጦ፡ ወውጊዜሃ። ወሶበ፡ ነፀረ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ውእ፡ ወኵሎሙ፡ ጉባኤ፡ ዘምስሌሁ፡ ፡ ንግሥት፡ ወውእቱ፡ ምሉአ፡ ቍ፡ ቅዱስ። ወትቤሎ፡ ንግሥት፡ ኢኢትትቃርን፡ ገሊላዊያነ፡ እስመ፡ ኀያል፨ ወጸንዐ፡ ቍጥዓሁ፡ ወአ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ናሁ፡ አጽነና፡ ኀቤሁ፡ ፡ ይስሐብዋ፡ ኀበ፡ አፍአ፡ ሀገትፉ፡ ሥጋሃ፡ በመናትፈ፡ ሐፂኮነት፡ ወተመጠወት፡ አክሊለ፡ ፡ ሐለዩ፡ ነገሥት፡ በእንተ፡ ግ
ሥአ፡ ፬፡ እምኣግብርቲሁ፡ ማእመሁ፡ ወገነዞ፡ በልብሱ፡ ወወሰዶ፡ ቤቶ፡ ኀገሩ፡ ልዳ፨ ወሐነጸ፡ ዲቤሃ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲሠናየ፨ እግዚአብሔር፡ ይምሐሮ፡ በልናሁ፡ ለንጉሥነ፡ Galāwdewosገላውዴዎስ፡ ወለንግትነ፡ Sabla Wangelሰብለ፡ ወንጌል። አሜን፨

አመ፡ ፳ወ፬፡ እምነ፡ ወርኀ፡ ሚያዝያ፡ በዛቲዕለት፡ ስምዐ፡ ኮነ፡ ስና፡ ቢጹ፡ ለቅዱስ፡ ኤስድሮስ፡ ዘዝኩር፡ አመ፡ ዕለተ፡ ፲ወ፰፡ እምነ፡ መጋቢት፨ ወውእቱ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ተኰነነ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ምስለ፡ ቢጹ፡ ኤስድሮስ፨ ወኮነ፡ ስምዐ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወተረፈ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ውስተ፡ ቤተ፡ ሞቅሕ፨ ወተስዕረ፡ መኰንነ፡ ፈርማ፡ ወተሠይመ፡ እምኔሁ፡ መኰንን፡ ካልእ፡ ወኮነ፡ ካልኡ፡ ይኤዝዝ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይትረፍ፡ ፩፡ መኑሂ፡ ዘይዜክር፡ ስመ፡ ክርስቶስ፨ ወአእመረ፡
